placements.overview:
JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Rajouri Garden was founded in 1988. It is a private institute and is located in Delhi. JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Rajouri Garden courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Rajouri Garden offers a total of 7 courses in stream such as Design. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are PG Diploma and UG Diploma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 125. These courses are offered to students across several specialisation such as Jewellery Design. Apart from this, the JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Rajouri Garden campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Rajouri Garden is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Design. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include PG Diploma.

Our college provides facilities to access WGSN and Skill India.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. ABGIT Punjab courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes placement 2024 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated placement team. Further, the college guarantees 100% placement assistance to students and offers job opportunities in top-notch companies.

The placement cell operates throughout the year to facilitate networking between companies and graduates. Further, the college provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies.

faqs.answer: A:    Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Frappel Trade House Llp, Irrigation And Water Resources Department Haryana, Sajid Kadival, Kamala Automobilescuttack, Gaore Network, Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Leica Microsystems, Vilas Rajapkar Consultancy ( Opc ) Pvtltd, Entire Ceramis Limited.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes offers a wide range of programmes to students at UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Science, Business Management, Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. At the UG level, the college offers various programmes such as BTech, BSc, BBA, BA, BHM, BPharm, BVoc, etc.

At the PG level, ABGI offers programmes including MBA and DPharm. Further, Aman Bhalla Group of Institutions courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as , Computer Science Engineering, , Agriculture, Nursing, etc. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you may get admission into the undergraduate courses offered at Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes after Class 12. However, admissions are done on the basis of a preset admission criteria of the desired UG course. For certain courses and cases, the institute may consider valid entrance exam scores. Students must ensure that they fulfil the criteria of the course before applying. Aspirants can reach out to the admission help desk of the institute to know more about ABGI admission chances.
faqs.question: Can I join Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes after Class 12?

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students got internships during the course, and salary packages are high, 6 to 8 LPA offered. Recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, data analysis, local startups, and mid companies, etc. The average packages are 3 to 5%. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good in the hostel as Wi-Fi connection is ahead. My department has good tables, and there are computers. The food is okay, very average food, but it's okay. Three times in a day we will get food. Meds are average. Sports and games are the same as above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I don't know about other courses, but I do know about nursing placements. Students do get placements in foreign too, like Germany, the UK, Malaysia, and many more. Many international students also come here, and they are also provided with scholarship benefits.
review_content.Infrastructure: In hostels, we are provided with 1 bed, 1 cooler, 1 study table, 1 chair, curtains, and 1 mattress. The facilities of the hostels are pretty good here. The cafeteria is also good, properly maintained, and completely hygienic. We also have a library, and different courses have their own libraries here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college for engineering, medicine, and education as well.

review_content.Placements: The best placement is here. More valuable companies come every year for placement, and the best lifestyle is here. Placements like Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki, Flipkart, Amazon, HCL, Facebook, Apple, and other types of companies are also coming every year for placement. Good placement facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Super college faculty and hostel, wow. The course is not very difficult, and the teacher teaches in an easy language for the students. There are all types of courses in engineering, medicine, and education under the B.A., B.Sc., B.Com., and B.Ed. degrees available. And now a day, MBA courses are added.

admission_process.title: Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes admission 2025is a blend of entrance and merit-based. Entrance exam scores may be taken into consideration for certain courses/ cases. Students can pursue a variety of programmes in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Nursing, Agriculture, and more. These programmes are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Also known asABGI, the institute provides its programmes via its colleges, such as the College of Pharmacy, College of Nursing, College of Engineering, etc. The admission process of the institution is carried out in offline mode generally. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the admission process, courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other information for Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes.

Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes, Pathankot admission criteriais a blend of merit and entrance depending on the course selected by the candidates. Students seeking to get into any of the offered courses are required to satisfy the eligibility requirements as specified by the concerned authority. The selection criteria may vary depending on the specialisation. The courses are offered in full-time mode. Aspirants can take a look at the following table to know about the general eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularABGI Pathankot courses:

The admission procedure for Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes includes several steps from registration, selection, and counselling (if applicable), and ends with admission confirmation. Aspirants need to ensure that they satisfy the criteria set by the college before applying online. Interested students can follow the steps listed below to complete theABGI admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can visit the official website of the institute to fill out the Admission Enquiry Form. Someone from the institute will reach out to the prospective candidate to help carry out the remaining process.
Step 2: Selection Process

The selection procedure may vary depending on the programme and specialisations. Students are shortlisted based on merit in the last qualifying exam. However, the institute may accept scores obtained in the relevant entrance exams. Additionally, students may have to participate in counselling for seat allotment.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, selected students need to pay theABGI admission fees.

review_summary.college_name: Thakur Polytechnic Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, Okayish faculty.

content.Placements: There were around 180-200 students. Getting placements after a Diploma is tough, so not many companies. All the students got internships for 3 months. Computer engineer, learnt a lot in the process, and also got a letter of recommendation from the company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch, with a great library and AC classrooms. Canteen and cafeteria food is mid, but lots of events, so it's a very happening college overall. The crowd can be a bit wee, but good people. Very active in the case of sports (don't miss Aventura). Also had many other events.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good.

content.Placements: Out of 200 students, only two were placed. The highest package offered is INR 2.4 lakh per annum. Only one company came during my batch, which is L&T Infotech. Well, for internships, there were several companies offering non-paid internships, and all the students have applied because it's mandatory for the diploma courses. During my batch, there was only one company that came for the placement because of COVID.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an advanced practical lab for all the courses like civil engineering and computer science, and in a day we have a 3-hour practical, and the infrastructure is really excellent. And we don't have the mess; we have the canteen, which provides average food, and we have places for sports and medical facilities too for medical emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineeering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This college is absolutely good, you have a fun ride here.

content.Placements: There were about 70 percent of students placed. The highest package offered was 6 LPA and the lowest was around 1.5 LPA. 100 per cent of students get internships related to their respective departments. The college promotes and helps startups as well to do better in our lives.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not that much active in the corridor area whereas, in the respective labs, they were superb. Apart from this, we had a great library with daily newspaper facilities like the Times of Mumbai and Mirror etc. The canteen food is not up to the mark sometimes.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. Top recruiting companies are L&T, Tata Projects, and H.K. Infra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides facilities like various laboratories, a library, and classrooms with smart boards. The infrastructure plays a very important role in the development of the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly. They are always ready to clear students' doubts. They are great teachers. They explain everything in detail.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: I've completed my college in computer branch where I have worked with great minded people. The greatest thing is instead of education it provides healthy relationship among people where you learn and grows professionally. It provides placement with around 3 to 4 LPA packages. A few classmates are working in some good companies like TCS, L & T, Infosys, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: It provides high-level infrastructure and free Wi-Fi. During lectures, mobile phones are strictly banned for all students. There is a college hostel if you want to stay in rent near the college, you can by your responsibility college wont take any responsibility after college timing. There is a first-class canteen and indoor and outdoor games on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: There is a great infrastructure here.
reviews.review_text: McDonald's is attached to our college, and the cafeteria is very good. Even the food served in the canteen is good, and the library is extremely lavish. The campus is also very good. There are even indoor games such as gym, carrom, pool, snooker and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Thakur Polytechnic is the best.
reviews.review_text: Our college has amazing faculty members and undoubtedly one of the best infrastructures. The canteen is amazing, and good food was available to the students. There was no hostel, but classrooms and the overall interior of the college make it very beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thakur Polytechnic.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is at par. The campus is mostly used for shooting purposes by various web series, daily soaps and movies, and that catches some limelight. There is a self canteen and a tiny small cafe inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is really good. Wi-Fi is available all over the college. All the labs have every essential machinery. The quality of canteen food is average. 
Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are available. Other events are also held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best diploma college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best parts of our college due to which students never bunk the college. The infrastructure of our college is very mesmerizing and fascinating that many of the bollywood movies are shot in our college. Many TV channels like Star Plus, Zee TV, and Sony have contracts with our college for shooting. Our college also has aviation, due to which the college has built a demo airplane to give us an experience, which is the best part of college.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It has a dedicated playroom where you can play games like carrom table tennis etc. The quality of the food in the canteen is very good. McDonald's is available around the corner. All the classrooms are air-conditioned and have sufficient lights. The library is fully furnished. It has a separate reading room and e-library.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good to gain knowledge and have personality development.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very good to study, and the environment of the college is also good for students. There is a good Wi-Fi facility in our college with good speed. There are libraries and labs for all different departments. There are a canteen and cafe in our college which provide good food services. There is a clinic in our college for an emergency. Many sports are played in our college.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SVU - Shri Venkateshwara University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time and Part Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the SVU - Shri Venkateshwara University offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The fees for SVU - Shri Venkateshwara University courses range between INR 16,000 to 49,97,286.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied and happy here.

content.Placements: Nearly about 97% of students got passed. I think 87% was the highest there in my batch. But they offered good internship opportunities. Mostly everyone joined them too and gave me the opportunity to join other big industry tycoons and had a meet up with them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was pretty good with a huge campus. Classes were also good to be sit there even for the whole day. They provided us with mostly every equipment needed for the practical. Most loved thing was the neat and clean environment all over there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members. Infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: All 250 students got placed from course. The highest is no limit but the lowest is 13 LPA. Students themselves get their further education by NEET PG. 100% of students of MBBS got internships. We are provided with a family adoption program which surely enhances our communication skills.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with AC and lecture hall with projector and electronic podium. Ground is available with multiple playable games like cricket, football, etc. Canteen is available with 24/7 supply of milk and eatables. Hostel facility is available with AC rooms, laundry, and sweeper facilities. Rooms are better than any college in NCR.

faqs.question: How can candidates join SVU - Shri Venkateshwara University?
faqs.answer: Marks are determined using the combined IPE+AP EAMCET results. To acquire the rank under 5000 needed to get a free seat at SV UNIVERSITY, you need to score higher than 105+. Eamcet qualifying marks are 60, and there is no minimum score requirement for candidates who have reservations. Candidates must take the SVUCET entrance exam, which is offered by Sri Venkateswara University, to be considered for admission to all PG programs with the exception of the M.B.A. and M.C.A. programs.

Security guards are available round the clock.Hot water is supplied during the winter. Water coolers are attached with R.O. installed on each floor.

library.description: The Shri Venkateshwara University has well stocked, air-conditioned and fully computerised multi-media libraries for its faculty. To ignite the intellectual spirit in young minds, a stock of 50,000 latest books, large collection of video/audio CDs, Magazines, Journals, industry and company information sources are made available to the students, faculty and staff. The university also has faculty-wise libraries to provide adequate support for complete academic pursuit. Additionally, separate reference section for each faculty recommended books for each course has also been provided.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied and happy here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was pretty good with a huge campus. Classes were also good to be sit there even for the whole day. They provided us with mostly every equipment needed for the practical. Most loved thing was the neat and clean environment all over there.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with AC and lecture hall with projector and electronic podium. Ground is available with multiple playable games like cricket, football, etc. Canteen is available with 24/7 supply of milk and eatables. Hostel facility is available with AC rooms, laundry, and sweeper facilities. Rooms are better than any college in NCR.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for top and average students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities like classrooms and a well-maintained library. The hostel facility, a canteen, medical facilities, and sports are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements really good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure and they provide us free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and gym. Faculty is good, calm, polite we can ask any doubts related to topics without any fear or hesitation. They are very cooperative .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and good placements for 2015, and the packages are good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostels were nearby. Attach various infrastructure facilities as common television, telephone, tables, and chairs sector. They were modern gym, and sports equipment was provided. it also provides an auditorium, and medical centers were available.

reviews.review_heading: College is still under construction, not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, workshops, library, gym, great classrooms, nice faculty, canteen was good and food there is great, there's a medical institution inside, games like basketball football indoors game like table tennis etc. and no AC's in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for medical sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice as the university is only 8 years old. It is trying to expand. It is situated near NH 24, near Moradabad in a lush green environment. The area is very nice, and it is located far away from the city, in Holy Ganges Plateau. So, lots and lots of greenery is present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a hub of education and opportunities. Come, learn and get rewarded talent.
reviews.review_text: The university is built on a huge area. The infrastructure of the university is good. There are well-equipped classrooms and computer laboratory. There is a mini library to exploit the knowledge. The quality of food is only a bit of concern. Apart from that, hostel, sports and facilities are up to mark. Events, fests and campus crowd are poor. It needs to be highlighted in terms of reputation.

A very good university campus with experienced faculty and good options for placements. Also good for enjoying your life along with studies. Very comfortable college timings and lots more. Good library facility, along with sports and gym facility. The hospital also available for free of cost. A very good university campus with experienced faculty and good options for placements. Also good for enjoying your life along with studies. Very comfortable college timings and lots more. Good library facility, along with sports and gym facility. The hospital also available for free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement and good facilities, but it is a mixed bag with faculty disappointments.
reviews.review_text: Shri Venkateshwara University has many courses like MBBS, B.Pharma, Diploma, B.Ed, etc. The hostels are very beautiful with separate rooms for two people per room, and boys and girls are not mixed in the rooms. The mess food is really good, and the canteen is unique. Many games are played daily.

reviews.review_heading: Short view of shri Venketeshwar university .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and development is good which is more attractive and development of the class. As the class walls are well cleaned and maintained with different types of attractive paints. As the furniture is good and the single student can sit by on one chair as they made separate furniture.

reviews.review_heading: Iiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiii.
reviews.review_text: I think the placement of my college is about 1 percent. And I think package offered in my college is about 1 to 1.5 lac. No top companies hire in it and the hire companies are local. Is to get a degree. Don't take admission in this for regular base classes.

reviews.review_heading: An Average College for Average Students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is still developing. Faculty members are below average. The college is not as per the expectations of studious students. One should try other colleges in Noida. The atmosphere is not up to the mark, the crowd consists of village people.

college_info.college_name: Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements

highlights.summary:
It is a private autonomous institute located in New Delhi. The Institute offers UG in Visual Communication and Digital Design, Digital Product Design, Game Art and Design. It offers PG in Advertising, Design and Digital Communication. École Intuit Lab India is home to three of the seven campuses of École Intuit Lab, a French Institute of Design, Digital and Strategy. It was co-founded in 2001 by Patrick Felices, Clément Derock and Frederic Lalande.

The three campuses in India are located in Mumbai, Kolkata and New Delhi. The institute provides all basic facilities to students, including wi-fi enabled campus, a cafeteria, air-conditioned classrooms and a library.

École Intuit Lab New Delhi highlights are mentioned below:

École Intuit Lab New Delhi offers UG and PG programmes. It offers four UG programmes and one PG programme. The duration of UG programmes is four years and PG programme is 18 months. The details related to École Intuit Lab New Delhi courses and fees are mentioned below:

Note: The above fee is inclusive of GST.

Read more: École Intuit Lab New Delhi Courses and Fees

The application fee for UG and PG courses is INR 1,000. The fast facts related to École Intuit Lab New Delhi admission are mentioned below:

The eligibility criteria is mentioned below:

École Intuit Lab New Delhi provides scholarships to meritorious students. The Institute awards 50 per cent tuition fee waiver to eligible students. École Intuit Lab New Delhi also offers need-based scholarships to deserving candidates.

reviews_list.review_title: EIL Delhi, A General Gist.

review_content.Placements: EIL has a vast network, given that all faculty are working professionals. This easily leads to internship and career opportunities, such as the two-month compulsory summer internship between the 2nd and 3rd years.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, including the software and the CAD lab. High-end PCs are available for work, and a gaming room may be added soon. For recreation, there are games like table tennis and foosball. There is a canteen and vending machines for food.
review_content.Faculty: The course provides a well-rounded experience, starting with the basics and moving on to specializations. It also offers modules that may not seem directly relevant but provide diverse learning and skill development.

college_info.college_name: Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi fee structure differs from course to course depending on the duration and level of the course. Ecole fees for any undergraduate programme such as Visual Communication & Digital Design, Game Art & Design, UI/UX Design and Animation & Motion Design is INR 27.35 Lakh. While Ecole fees for PG in Advertising, Design & Digital Communication is INR 6.78 Lakh. The numbers provided are restricted to the total tuition fees. Apart from this, candidates will have to pay INR 1500 as application fees. Candidates must visit the official website to learn more about the Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi fee structure.

Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi offers PG in Advertising, Design & Digital Communication as an 18 month programme with 20 seats. The College offers PG in Advertising, Design & Digital Communication with the eligibility criteria of qualifying graduation from any field. The Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi PG in Advertising, Design & Digital Communication course fee structure has INR 6.78 Lakh as the total tuition fees.

Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi UG in Visual Communication & Digital Design programme is available as a 4 year programme with 20 seats. The College offers this course in full-time mode with the eligibility criteria of merit and aptitude test. The total fees of the course is INR 27.35 Lakh, which includes tuition fees, one-time payments and various other components. To know more about the Ecole fees structure, visit the official website or enquire offline from the admission desk.

reviews_list.review_title: Excellent academics, and the best college in India.

review_content.Placements: Our classmates have been selected in many reputed companies with the highest salary package of 9.50 lacs per year and an average salary of 4 lacs per year. The placement committee is also present on campus and secures good placements. Top-notch companies have visited here and hired our students with high packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building of our college is very nicely constructed and fulfills all the necessities of students and teachers. Lecture rooms are well-built, and computer labs and medical laboratories are well-equipped. Auditoriums are properly up-to-date. The college campus's infrastructure is excellent.

With a maximum placement rate of 80 percent for students from our institute, Many reputed companies are visiting campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college boasts modern infrastructure equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, including spacious classrooms, labs, a vast library with digital resources, and recreational areas for students. With this well-planned infrastructure, the college provides students with an inspiring space to excel in their academics and cultivate a vibrant campus community.

review_summary.college_name: MKM Group of Colleges For Girls Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (Medical ) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a decent experience in this college.

content.Placements: They provide placement opportunities on their campus. But they offer a low salary according to the college professor job. But for someone who just needs experience, it is a good opportunity, but someone who is applying for a permanent job should apply somewhere else at a good package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel rooms are pretty good, but washroom cleanliness is an issue. Classrooms and libraries provide a good environment for studying. Canteens provide decent food. Sports and events are organised so students can show their talent like archery, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Maths - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very supportive college staff and college management.

content.Placements: The placement process at MKM College was very effective. More than 85 percent of students were placed with the minimum package of 7.5 LPA, which is a good start for freshmen, and a maximum of 10 lacs per annum. According to what the company is offering, every year, many students are placed in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has excellent facilities with all the requirements. Well-maintained laboratories, classrooms, and medical facilities are provided 24 hours a day in colleges and hostels. There is a large, fully computerized library and a normal library. And there is a free Wi-Fi zone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Excellent academics, and the best college in India.

content.Placements: Our classmates have been selected in many reputed companies with the highest salary package of 9.50 lacs per year and an average salary of 4 lacs per year. The placement committee is also present on campus and secures good placements. Top-notch companies have visited here and hired our students with high packages.
content.Infrastructure: The building of our college is very nicely constructed and fulfills all the necessities of students and teachers. Lecture rooms are well-built, and computer labs and medical laboratories are well-equipped. Auditoriums are properly up-to-date. The college campus's infrastructure is excellent.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The best academic and placement institute in the NCR.

content.Placements: Here, the placements are of extremely good quality. The placement committee is likewise excellent. The highest salary package offered is between 6 and 9 lacs per year. With a maximum placement rate of 80 percent for students from our institute, Many reputed companies are visiting campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college boasts modern infrastructure equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, including spacious classrooms, labs, a vast library with digital resources, and recreational areas for students. With this well-planned infrastructure, the college provides students with an inspiring space to excel in their academics and cultivate a vibrant campus community.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of MKM Group of Colleges For Girls.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very supportive; almost 90 percent students are placed from college campus with a 4 LPA salary package. I am really grateful to MKM for providing us such a great opportunity. Many reputed companies come here for the placement procedure.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is very good and comfortable. No one can encounter any problem; big classes are available with proper Wi-Fi connectivity, good library, and labs are also there. Proper medical facility, canteen, and hostel are available there. Taste of food in mess is acceptable.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel rooms are pretty good, but washroom cleanliness is an issue. Classrooms and libraries provide a good environment for studying. Canteens provide decent food. Sports and events are organised so students can show their talent like archery, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Very supportive college staff and college management.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent facilities with all the requirements. Well-maintained laboratories, classrooms, and medical facilities are provided 24 hours a day in colleges and hostels. There is a large, fully computerized library and a normal library. And there is a free Wi-Fi zone.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent academics, and the best college in India.
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is very nicely constructed and fulfills all the necessities of students and teachers. Lecture rooms are well-built, and computer labs and medical laboratories are well-equipped. Auditoriums are properly up-to-date. The college campus's infrastructure is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The best academic and placement institute in the NCR.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts modern infrastructure equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, including spacious classrooms, labs, a vast library with digital resources, and recreational areas for students. With this well-planned infrastructure, the college provides students with an inspiring space to excel in their academics and cultivate a vibrant campus community.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MKM Group of Colleges For Girls.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good and comfortable. No one can encounter any problem; big classes are available with proper Wi-Fi connectivity, good library, and labs are also there. Proper medical facility, canteen, and hostel are available there. Taste of food in mess is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, my experience in college is very good. I enjoy each and every moment of my college time.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is good, the garden area in the college is very good, the digital classrooms are good, the library is very peaceful and consists of many books, the digital boards are technologically advanced, the college also has Wi-Fi facility, and hostel service is present.

reviews.review_heading: Best girls college in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The college is very spacious; it has all the necessary infrastructure, like a computer lab, a chemistry lab, a biotechnology lab, a multi sports field, a fully computerized library, and a lush green campus. The college campus infrastructure is excellent overall.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching quality is very good .
reviews.review_text: MKM College's infrastructure is very good. All these facilities are available like a canteen, laboratories, wi-fi campus, smart classes, many computer labs, department-wise medical labs, etc. They are well maintained, the living space is good and hygienic food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good experience in this college .
reviews.review_text: The college is very spacious; it has all the necessary infrastructure, like very spacious classrooms, a digital library, computer labs, department-wise medical labs, physics and chemistry labs, a huge sports field, etc. The facilities they provide are up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful and best girls college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in our college are very good, like wi-fi, a fully computerized digital library, a seminar hall, a sports center, and big, clean classrooms. The food available is both in a mess and the canteen is really good. The hostels are neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: MKM college is the best girls college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment, including classrooms, laboratories, a digital library and a very large sports center. And our college has an excellent learning environment. The college campus infrastructure is excellent overall.

reviews.review_heading: The Quality of teaching is superb.
reviews.review_text: Our College Building and lawns are well maintained. There are a large parking facilities, number of classrooms and labs like computer labs, medical lab, Chemistry lab and a huge play ground. The whole building wi-fi availability. College providing the food very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Great College with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: College Infrastructure is really best. The infrastructure is good and attractive which gives students a healthy environment and has been covered with green plants helping to relax in summers. Talking about living space like hostel, rest room it is also satisfying.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus life is very good.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment were provided in this college. Free Wi-Fi was enabled on our campus. Our college building was well-maintained. Mess was run by the students' committee. The canteen was also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MKM Group of Colleges For Girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Our college buildings were great. Many canteens were available. Parking area was very good. Classrooms were spacious. There was a huge auditorium in this college. Sports were conducted such as cricket, etc. Playground was available on our campus. A badminton court was also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in the MBBS course. There is a one-year compulsory internship for all students. A stipend of Rs. 10,000 is given per month to all students. Students are rotated in all departments and students learn all the skills necessary in this one-year internship course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: MBBS life at Akash Institute.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course. We have a one-year compulsory internship. They also provide a stipend, which is around 10,000 per month in our college. All students have to do a compulsory internship for one year. We are posted in all branches during this period.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Data Science (Advanced) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good infrastructure, college, and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are good. They are good. They provide internships in 2nd or 3rd year with a good stipend. Packages are also good. Companies like Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Flipkart, and many others come for placements. They provide good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. There is a huge building and very good. It is beautiful and eco-friendly. It has a green nature. The college hostel is there. It is also good. The food is okay but not that much good. The college owns a hospital so we can have free checkups.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MBBS at Akash Institute.

content.Placements: There are compulsory internships for all students in our hospital. There are no placements. Students usually prepare for PG after internships. Rs. 10,000 stipend is given every month. Students will learn all skills needed in this one year. Students can also work after MBBS in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, clean, and hygienic. The food is tasty. The hostel fee also includes the mess fee. Wi-Fi is not available. The library is peaceful. Labs are well-built. The canteen has both veg and non-veg food. A sports ground is also present. A swimming pool is available.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Akash Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: They merged with RS College, and now it has become Akash Global College of Management and Science. There is no placement because it is a recently opened college so after the 5th semester we will know about the placement. So I'll give feedback after 2 years. And in my opinion, it is better to go to another college.
content.Infrastructure: Because there are not enough faculty members available, we will not be able to finish the syllabus on time. Department-wise, I am not sure, so I am only talking about MBA faculty. Hostel quality is not good because bed bugs are there and food quality is also not good so better choose a government hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Akash Group of Institutions Admission: Details & Updates

admission_process.title: Akash Group of Institutions Admission Process

paragraphs: Akash Group of Institutions admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG and PG levels. In total, the institution offers 77 courses to the students across various streams, such as IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, and Medicine & Health Sciences, among others. Amid all these courses, some of the popularAkash Group of Institutions coursesoffered at the UG level include B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, and B.Sc. and at the PG level, the institution provides, MCA, M.Com, and MPT, etc. Students interested in Akash Group of Institutions admission 2024 must check the fees and other details below:
lists: Akash Group of Institutions Fees: The overall tuition fees charged for UG courses range between INR 200,000 - INR 635,382 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 570,960 - INR 2,142,090. In addition to the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
Akash Group of Institutions Course Duration: The duration for UG courses provided by Akash Group of Institutions ranges between 3 - 4 years and the same for PG courses falls between 2 - 3 years.

faqs.question: What's the seat availability for courses at the Akash Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Combined intake across all courses at Akash Group of Institutions is up to 997. Akash Group of Institutions offers BCA, BBA, MCA, B.Sc, M.Com, B.Com, BPT, UG Diploma, B.A, MBBS, MPT, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MD, MS courses for students to build their careers in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Nursing, Medicine & Health Sciences, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering. These highly regarded programs are available in full-time mode, catering to the needs of students who wish to obtain a comprehensive education in this field.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the MBA course at Akash Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for the MBA course at Akash Group of Institutions is that the candidate should have passed graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate. The entrance exams accepted include MAT, CAT, XAT, CMAt, ATMA, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Akash Group of Institutions for MBA?
faqs.answer: Applicants for MBA programs at Akash Group of Institutions must have a Bachelors degree with at least 50% aggregate marks from a recognised institution. Candidates are also often required to have legitimate results from entry tests such as the CAT, MAT, CMAT, GMAT or the Karnataka state PGCET. Those who meet these qualifications may apply directly through the Akash Institutions website or by visiting the admissions office. The selection procedure examines entrance exam scores, academic performance and occasionally includes interviews to judge the applicant's appropriateness for the program.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good infrastructure, college, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. There is a huge building and very good. It is beautiful and eco-friendly. It has a green nature. The college hostel is there. It is also good. The food is okay but not that much good. The college owns a hospital so we can have free checkups.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS at Akash Institute.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, clean, and hygienic. The food is tasty. The hostel fee also includes the mess fee. Wi-Fi is not available. The library is peaceful. Labs are well-built. The canteen has both veg and non-veg food. A sports ground is also present. A swimming pool is available.

reviews.review_heading: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS life at Akash Institute.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Because there are not enough faculty members available, we will not be able to finish the syllabus on time. Department-wise, I am not sure, so I am only talking about MBA faculty. Hostel quality is not good because bed bugs are there and food quality is also not good so better choose a government hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for academics but campus life is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Hostel facilities are decent. Our campus is not spacious. There is a playground on our campus. This college is still under construction. Management courses like MBA, BBA, and BCA have separate buildings.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and teaching and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have very modern infrastructure and all facilities needed like libraries, classrooms and access to the hospital. We have a very good hostel facility, and the food quality is really nice, the hygiene maintained in the mess is also more than satisfactory. Being attached to a hospital, we have access to medical facilities 24/7, we have an hour of sports and games every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Institute of Nursing Devanahalli.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in Devanahalli which is very near Kempegowda International Airport. The college building is super with nice classrooms and labs. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. The hostel is inside the same compound. The hostel is good looking and facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure, and the facilities are also excellent.
reviews.review_text: This college provides laboratories and classrooms. The library was clean and there was total silence. There were many books to read in the library, the laboratories were good, and students can try every experiment. The books which were given by Aakash were the best, and students can learn everything from them. The canteen was provided, and the food was very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure and very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure, along with neat labs and classrooms. There are neat hostel facilities with good Wi-Fi facility. Good quality food is served in the hostel, and the canteen is good with good food. Our college provides good sports with neat equipment and also good medical facilities with students-friendly staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Institute of Medical Sciences & Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls are quite good of 170 capacity. There are 4 lecture halls in the college and 1 in the hospital. Two of the lecture halls are air-conditioned. The building is not that great but well-equipped with labs, research labs, and demonstration rooms. The opportunities for sports is minimal. The canteen is fine. Medical facilities in some departments are good, but some needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and education-wise facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The college provides facilities like large building, spacious auditoriums, demo rooms, well-equipped labs, libraries, study places, common rooms and canteens. The college provides good hostel facility with good food and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: Our college got its own central library which is very informative and helpful. There is a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel but not in college. Labs are spacious and clean with good equipment. Hostel food is good, and they serve South Indian meals. The college has its canteen where you can get Chinese food. Medical facilities are excellent and effective. There is a huge ground for sports, and a basketball court and badminton court are available here.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms and computer available here assist in learning. Classrooms are air-conditioned and are huge and can accommodate more than 200 students. They are also equipped with projectors. The library has books for subjects and also has a computer room for learning. There are good washrooms on all floors.

reviews.review_heading: Life at aimsrc medicos life.
reviews.review_text: We have gym in hostel. Library is very near to college with different kinds of books. We have very good playground with all kind of sport courts. Hostel is 3 sharing and 2 sharing with clean rooms and washrooms and hot water for batch. Mess food is very hygienic and tasty with evening snacks provided.

admission_overview.college_name: NIF Global Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: NIF Global admissionismerit-basedfor all UG, PG, diploma, and certificate courses. Candidates seeking admission must start their admission process by matching the course-specific selection and eligibility criteria. AtNIF Global, the application mode is online. The institute offersBDes, BBA, BVoc and othersat the UG and PG levels. Further, the institute also offers UG diploma and certificate courses. To know more aboutNIF Globaladmission 2025go through the following sections:

NIF Global admission 2025 is live on the college's official website. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. The courses offered by the college include BDes, BBA, BVoc and others. Interested applicants can check out the updated information aboutNIF Global courseseligibility and selection criteria in the following table:
NIF Global admissions 2025 is merit-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around NIF Global admission 2025:
Step 1: Application Procedure

Commencing the admission process for NIF Global in 2025, candidates need to initiate the application process. The application form can be downloaded from the institute's official website. After filling out the form, applicants must submit it via post or in person at the designated department. While the application and entrance test fees are paid online, candidates must attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan to the application form.
Step 2: Eligibility Assessment & Selection Rounds

Admission to NIF Global is primarily based on merit. Candidates must meet the minimum eligibility criteria i.e. pass Class 12 from a recognised board for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses. The selection process is entirely merit-based.
Step 3: Merit List Publication & Counselling

Upon the completion of all selection rounds, NIF Global will publish the merit list comprising the names of selected candidates. Subsequently, candidates must participate in the counselling process for their respective courses. Once selected, students need to pay theNIF Global feesto secure their seats at the institute.

college_info.intro: Amity University Greater Noida offers various undergraduate and postgraduate in different fields such as Applied Sciences, Commerce, Computer Science/ IT, Economics, Engineering, English Literature, Fashion, Film & Drama, Finance, Journalism, Management, Mass Communication and many more. The courses are offered in full-time mode. The courses provided by the university include BSc, BCom, BCA, BA, BTech, BBA, MBA, MTech, MCA, etc. Candidates can refer to the table below to know about the popular programmes offered at Amity University Greater Noida:

placements.overview: The placement cell of Amity University Greater Noida has Regular industry interaction, live projects, industry mentors, summer internships, CEO series and lectures by industry experts. A series of Pre-Placement sessions are organised to provide a great opportunity for students to learn about the organisation. Leading companies across various disciplines come for campus placements at Amity. A record 1309 students were placed in a single day by Accenture, a Fortune 500 Company as part of Amity University Greater Noida Placements. There are 70+ Departments, 300+ Programmes, 150+ Institution & Centers. Over the years 27000 Amity students have got on campus placements in MNCs and top organisations.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied and recommend this college to everyone.

review_content.Placements: The percentage rate is very high, that is, 89 percent of students in my course get placed every year. The highest package is 9 LPA, the average is 6 LPA-7 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA-4 LPA. 90 percent of students got internships from my course and in companies like HCL, TCS, etc. The top roles offered are software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure is very good. College has two huge playgrounds. In fact, 34 badminton courts, a basketball court, and classrooms. They are fully air-conditioned, and the library is also air-conditioned. The hostel is of two types girls' and boys'.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Amity University, Greater Noida, is a great choice. A decision you won't regret.

review_content.Placements: Placements are there with CGPA 7 and above. Decent companies visit the campus, like Wipro, TCS, Dell, and even a few finance-tech companies. Just be eligible for it. Top roles being offered are Software developer, engineer, and Software developer, engineer intern.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, AC, amphitheatre style smart classrooms are there for students, and campus is Wi-Fi enabled 24/7. Mess has home-like food, and pretty other options are available at the cafeteria too. Sports and Arcadia-like structure are also available on the campus.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University, Greater Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college is good, and the infrastructure is very good if you compare near college.

content.Placements: 50% student are placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. TCS and Wipro recruit. 80% percent Designer, and many other roles are offered in this college depend on your course, like if you are doing B.Tech CSE, so you also get the SDM role and backed development.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs are good, and classrooms are also good. The hostel is average, and the mess is also of good quality. This is very good if you want to learn more about infrastructure, and I am not in a hostel, I can't tell more, but a friend told me it is okay, you can choose a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and infrastructure, but placements need to be improved.

content.Placements: Placements for my course are average, around 40-50% students from my batch got placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is around 6 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average package stood near 3.5 to 4 LPA. Common roles offered are an accountant executive, junior executive and salesperson.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, and well-maintained classrooms are spacious, and most rooms have projectors and proper seating. The library has sufficient academic books and a peaceful study environment. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and basic amenities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied and recommend this college to everyone.

content.Placements: The percentage rate is very high, that is, 89 percent of students in my course get placed every year. The highest package is 9 LPA, the average is 6 LPA-7 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA-4 LPA. 90 percent of students got internships from my course and in companies like HCL, TCS, etc. The top roles offered are software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure is very good. College has two huge playgrounds. In fact, 34 badminton courts, a basketball court, and classrooms. They are fully air-conditioned, and the library is also air-conditioned. The hostel is of two types girls' and boys'.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amity University, Greater Noida, is a great choice. A decision you won't regret.

content.Placements: Placements are there with CGPA 7 and above. Decent companies visit the campus, like Wipro, TCS, Dell, and even a few finance-tech companies. Just be eligible for it. Top roles being offered are Software developer, engineer, and Software developer, engineer intern.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, AC, amphitheatre style smart classrooms are there for students, and campus is Wi-Fi enabled 24/7. Mess has home-like food, and pretty other options are available at the cafeteria too. Sports and Arcadia-like structure are also available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, wonderful infrastructure and helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Batch 2023, B.Com (Hons). 60 to 70 percent students got placed. The highest package is 30 LPA. The average is 7 LPA. The lowest is 5 LPA. Top recruiters were Deloitte, EY, TCS, Infosys, Accenture, HCL, IBM, Wipro, Google, Goldman Sachs, Cognizant, SAP Labs, Cisco, VMware, ZS Associate and Reliance. Around 65-70% students got internships in HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, PwC, Deloitte, and Optum.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, air-conditioned, and equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi. The department has computer labs with updated systems, access to e-resources, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities include clean rooms, Wi-Fi, laundry services, and common areas. Mess food is average with a mix of vegetarian and non-vegetarian options, while the canteen offers more variety. Medical facilities include a health center with doctors on call. Sports infrastructure is good, with indoor and outdoor facilities for cricket, football, basketball, badminton, and gymnasium access.

faqs.question: What entrance exam is accepted for admission into MBA programme at AUGN?

faqs.answer: Students applying to different UG courses at Amity University, Greater Noida should have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate marks for non-sponsored category (45% aggregate marks for sponsored category). They are majorly selected on the basis of merit.
faqs.question: What is the common eligibility for different UG courses at Amity University Greater Noida?

faqs.answer: AUGN generally offers merit-based admission into various UG and PG courses. Students are assessed based on their performance in last qualifying exam. Admission in MBA programme is merit-based.
faqs.question: What is the selection process at AUGN?

paragraphs: Amity University Greater Noida admissionis a multi-step process. The candidates must begin the process by fulfilling the eligibility and apply by filling the application form on official website of college. The admission criteria for all courses, except MBA, are merit-based. For MBA admission, Amity University accepts various national-level entrance exam scores, such as CAT, MAT, GMAT, CMAT, XAT and NMAT. Students who have not given any of these entrance exams can appear for Amity Written Test on the day of interview.
Interested candidates can check below the admission process at Amity University, Greater Noida:
Application Process

TheAmity University Greater Noida application process is conducted onlineon the official website of the University. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria must visit the official website to apply for their desired course. Applicants must submit the application fee and complete the process before the due date.
Shortlisting of Candidates

Candidates are shortlisted based on their merit in the qualifying exam. For MBA, the admission criteria is entrance-based and the candidates are shortlisted based on their performance inMAT/XAT/CAT/NMAT/CMAT/GMAT/ Amity Written Test + Interview (English Language Test + Management Aptitude Test applicable + Extempore + PI).
Admission Confirmation

Shortlisted candidates will be notified about their selection. To confirm their acceptance, candidates are required topay the admission confirmation feeandappear for the document verification processto complete the admission process.

AUGN course fee is sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Students who get selected have to pay admission fee as the final step for seat confirmation. The below table mentions the AUGN tution fee for some of the popular courses:
Note:This is taken from the official website of college. It may change.

faqs.question: How many courses are offered at Amity University Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: Amity University Greater Noida offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. faqs.question: Does Amity Greater Noida offer direct admission?
faqs.answer: Students securing 75% and above (aggregate) in Class 12 (CBSE/ ISC/ State-Boards of 2022/2021) are exempted from the selection process. The aggregate percentage will be calculated on the basis of marks scored in English & three academic subjects (compulsorily including subjects of eligibility and excluding Physical Education, Fine Arts, Performing Arts or any Vocational/ non-written subjects). These subjects will be considered for respective/ selected disciplines.Candidates qualifying under direct admission criteria stand exempted from the entrance test. Only GD & PI will be conducted for eligible candidates.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and infrastructure are very nice.
reviews.review_text: The college classrooms are well-equipped. To ensure the best connectivity, the college provides Wi-Fi access for students. Various types of labs are available for students to conduct experiments and engage in essential activities. Each course has its own specialized labs, and library facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college among private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is amazing. The rooms are spacious and the food is good enough for a hostel mess. Water supply is 24/7. There's a sports room and even a ending machines. The only problem is there are certain restrictions for girls and a long procedure for out pass.

reviews.review_heading: This college does not fit your expectations and it is a waste of money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus and classrooms have AC and projectors. The library is average. It can provide the books for your course and it has two floors to sit and study. The hostel rooms are nice but the food in the mess is not so good. There are no medical facilities and you have to go to a nearby hospital which is expensive. There are games like basketball, football, badminton, and cricket which are played on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members. Come here.
reviews.review_text: The course is really good here, but the hostel and its facilities are very poor. The quality of food and the rooms I got when I was in the hostel were poor. The warden doesn't let students even stand outside their rooms. They judge students for everything, even their clothes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: It is a fully Wi-Fi campus from classrooms to the library is vast. It has books related to every field and course. Classrooms are amphitheater-style and fully air-conditioned, etc. Labs are fast and fully functional. Lab managers are available to help as needed.

reviews.review_heading: Introduction of our college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the whole campus has excellent Wi-Fi connectivity. The classrooms are smart classrooms with projectors. Hostels are inside the campus, which also has AC, a clean mess and a cafeteria. Also, there is a gym and an indoor playing area.

college_info.college_name: Amity University, Greater Noida

data.description: Amity University Greater Noida has two separate hostels for boys and girls that exist within the Amity University Greater Noida campus. Hostel rooms are provided on a twin/three-sharing basis with all modern facilities. The hostels also have separate messes with the latest Kitchen equipment and spacious dining halls to provide healthy and hygienic meals. The hostels have round-the-clock security and students are expected to abide by the hostel rules.

reviews_list.review_title: Moderate academics but limited industry exposure for students.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students from our course were placed in the latest placement cycle. The highest, the lowest, and the average packages were not officially disclosed by the institution. TCS was the major recruiting company for our course. The internship percentage is also unknown, as no official data was provided. Students who received internships mainly focused on gaining better knowledge and efficient practical experience. The roles offered are designed to improve technical skills and overall professional growth.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers good facilities like smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and good teachers. Hostels are decent, with AC rooms, laundry services, and bus transportation. However, the hostel food is only average and needs improvement. Overall, the campus environment is comfortable. There is still room for improvement in both academics and facilities. Considering everything, I would rate the college 7 out of 10.

review_content.Placements: IBM, Microsoft, and TCS were most recruiting companies for this course. 90 percent of students got internships in those above companies. The highest package offered by the course was 12 LPA for a beginner, depending on your skills. The lowest was 4 LPA, and I think it was a decent package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available. Lab was there with more than 400 PCs. It had huge classroom with smart monitor. Huge spaced library was also provided. Hostels were providing decent quality for the students. They provided medical facilities. The food provided in the mess was of decent quality.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The core subjects are usually the same. Though the electives differ. Some of the major ones taught are - English, History, Psychology, Political Science, Philosophy, Social work, Economics, Sociology, Anthropology, Rural Studies, and more. Bachelor of Arts is a 3 year program. It can be pursued full-time, part-time, or through distance learning.Click to know aboutBA Subjects and Specialisations.
faqs.question: Q: What are the subjects taught in BA?

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

faqs.answer: It depends on what candidates mean by an Aviation professional. By far the easier and better job is that of a pilot. If candidates are young (aged 12-18), it is recommended that they pursue a general course of study. Take as many Maths and Science courses as possible. It may appear unusual to study Geography and Geology, but candidates would want to know what they are looking at.The most common aviation degree programme is the Bachelor of Science in Aviation. This degree provides a broad understanding of the Aviation industry, covering topics such as aviation regulations, safety, management, and operations. Graduates with this degree can pursue careers as pilots, air traffic controllers, airport managers, and more.
faqs.question: Q: Which Aviation degree programme should I pursue?

review_summary.college_name: The Yenepoya Institute of Arts, Science, Commerce and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Cybersecurity, Ethical Hacking and Data Analytics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good for medical. Teaching is average. Facilities are good.

content.Placements: It does not have any specific course. You need to pass PUC (+1, +2) with more than 50%. If you have more than 80%, you do not need to pay the last semester's fee. The package starts from 4 LPA to 12 LPA. In Cyber Security, students with above 80% get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms have very good facilities. This college mainly focuses on studies, not sports. The college is mainly famous for the medical field, but the medical facilities are not very good. Compared to other colleges, this college has good food and a good hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cybersecurity, Data Analytics and Ethical Hacking - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Utterly disappointed by the course structure and curriculum.

content.Placements: No placements, and we are the only batch with this course, and there are no college-aided placements at all. Don't expect anything good from here. No reputed companies come here for recruitment. I know it's sad, but that's the reality. Even though we were told that an internship was embedded in the course, it's not.
content.Infrastructure: The college is very bad. No good facilities were ever given. Libraries don't even have books related to our major, and there is not a single thing worth the money we are paying. Not even a properly maintained sick room or a nurse is present in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cybersecurity, Data Analytics and Ethical Hacking - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Moderate academics but limited industry exposure for students.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students from our course were placed in the latest placement cycle. The highest, the lowest, and the average packages were not officially disclosed by the institution. TCS was the major recruiting company for our course. The internship percentage is also unknown, as no official data was provided. Students who received internships mainly focused on gaining better knowledge and efficient practical experience. The roles offered are designed to improve technical skills and overall professional growth.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers good facilities like smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and good teachers. Hostels are decent, with AC rooms, laundry services, and bus transportation. However, the hostel food is only average and needs improvement. Overall, the campus environment is comfortable. There is still room for improvement in both academics and facilities. Considering everything, I would rate the college 7 out of 10.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Yenepoya Institute of Arts, Science, Commerce, and Management Kulur (BCA).

content.Placements: Currently, I am a first year student so I don't know much about the placement but I think from 4 and 5 semesters onwards the placements start. We can apply for placements but there are criteria that we should meet, like we are eligible for placement only if we don't have any backlogs or spending fees. The recruiting companies are TCS, IBM, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is awesome. The campus and library are very neat and clean. Classrooms have AC. They always keep the campus clean. The library is also very good. Overall, the infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel is also very neat and clean. Every room has AC and Wi-Fi. Laundry is also available.
