reviews.review_heading: Good for medical. Teaching is average. Facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms have very good facilities. This college mainly focuses on studies, not sports. The college is mainly famous for the medical field, but the medical facilities are not very good. Compared to other colleges, this college has good food and a good hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Utterly disappointed by the course structure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college is very bad. No good facilities were ever given. Libraries don't even have books related to our major, and there is not a single thing worth the money we are paying. Not even a properly maintained sick room or a nurse is present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Moderate academics but limited industry exposure for students.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good facilities like smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and good teachers. Hostels are decent, with AC rooms, laundry services, and bus transportation. However, the hostel food is only average and needs improvement. Overall, the campus environment is comfortable. There is still room for improvement in both academics and facilities. Considering everything, I would rate the college 7 out of 10.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available. Lab was there with more than 400 PCs. It had huge classroom with smart monitor. Huge spaced library was also provided. Hostels were providing decent quality for the students. They provided medical facilities. The food provided in the mess was of decent quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Yenepoya Institute of Arts, Science, Commerce, and Management Kulur (BCA).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome. The campus and library are very neat and clean. Classrooms have AC. They always keep the campus clean. The library is also very good. Overall, the infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel is also very neat and clean. Every room has AC and Wi-Fi. Laundry is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are provided. Everything is there library, Wi-Fi, and everything else. The hostel has a very nice environment for studies and food at the beginning, but eventually, you have to move out to seek more options in life. As a hostel, they also provide Wi-Fi and food.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect college for passionate students.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities here are truly highlighted and need to be truly appreciated. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are 10/10. I truly prefer Yenepoya Deemed to be University if you are a person who values infrastructure and money and needs better surroundings. The food and quality of the hostel are also very appreciated because I am staying in the hostel currently. We have all the facilities, and a good warden and security. All are very friendly, and the facilities are value for money and worth it.
...

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied with college, but they should have provided free Wi-Fi for the students.
reviews.review_text: While coming to infrastructure, there are no compromises, air-conditioned classrooms, labs, and offices. There are 2 food courts and 2 different canteens. There is a vast library with a lot of books. We have very good medical facilities as well as a huge playground. Wi-Fi costs additional money.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, there is a strong infrastructure, supportive faculty members, and a placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The hostels provide AC rooms, a Wi-Fi study room, a canteen, and a cafeteria. They also provide a culture fest and sports for hostel students. The good food is available, and it is not that bad for eating. They also provide good medical services from their own hospital.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good for enjoying the campus life.
reviews.review_text: This course is good to study, and the infrastructure of the college is very good. The top companies like IBM and TCS, etc., appreciate it as well. The college is NAAC A+ accredited and is one of the best colleges in Mangalore. The hostel food and stay are also good and safe. They provide good security too.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the faculty members of Yenepoya College.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with a library, computer labs, classrooms with biometric fingerprints for attendance, and Wi-Fi. The quality of food in my hostel is average. Compared to other hostels, my hostel (Jeppu Hostel) is far better which is what I have heard a lot. It also provides medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college it does provide good placements try to take ibm oriented courses.
reviews.review_text: The college and the hostel does have great infrastructure there are libraries and AC s in classrooms and Wi-Fi for students and hostel also does not back in facility and infrastructure and it has AC in hostel tooo and great food, and only 6 people in a room with attached bathroom .

reviews.review_heading: College is good and you can experience after join.
reviews.review_text: But about campus, there is too little space in Balmatta, but labs and classrooms are pretty good. The hostel in Jeppu is the best hostel I have ever seen. It good food, daily room cleaning, 12 hours of AC, a gym is there and also emergency ambulance is there ground is there for sports activities in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My personal opinion about my college, Yenepoya University.
reviews.review_text: We have good facilities on our campus, such as a canteen, libraries, etc. Our classrooms are fully AC. Our college provides free medical facilities for students. The hostel facilities are good, with good food and AC in every room. We also have sports events at the hostel and college.

reviews.review_heading: My insights Yenepoya College review.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have classrooms with AC and Smart TVs, so students can study easily by seeing that. We have computer labs with more than 100 computers, and we also have a library with various books, including study materials. The quality of food in the hostel and canteen is very good, and we have chicken dishes four days a week. There is also a medical room for students who get injured or ill.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about The Yenepoya Institute of Arts, Science, Commerce and Management, Yenepoya (Deemed to be University)

placements.overview:
Edu Brain Academy, New Delhi is a private institute. It is located in Delhi. Edu Brain Academy, New Delhi provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 47 courses across specialisations such as Advertising, Bakery & Confectionery, Digital Marketing, Fashion Design and Hair Styling & Grooming. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.Sc., M.Sc., B.Des, B.J.M.C. and After 10th Diploma. Edu Brain Academy, New Delhi fees ranges between INR 20,000 to 6,40,000. The student intake for these courses is 100. Edu Brain Academy, New Delhi offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Hospitality & Travel, Animation and Beauty & Fitness. The median salary offered to students is INR 3,31,818. Edu Brain Academy, New Delhi offers all the campus facilities to students.

college_info.college_name: Utkal University of Culture - UUC Odisha

highlights.summary:
Utkal University of Culture is a public university in Bhubaneswar, Odisha dedicated for research, teaching and education in the field of culture. It was established in 1999, under the recognition of University Grants Commission (UGC). The University offers admission to undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma and doctoral courses in the fields of Arts, Design and Hotel Management. Utkal University of Culture admission process is merit-based and entrance-based, respective to the course.

The University offers admission to undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma and doctoral courses in the fields of Arts, Design and Hotel Management. Utkal University of Culture application mode is Online. Below are important details of Utkal University of Culture admission process that an applicant must know of:

Utkal University of Culture offers BPA, BFA, BFD, BID, BTD, BTTM and BHM courses at the UG level and offers MA, MVA, MPA, MTTM and MHM at the PG level. The university also offers PG Diploma courses and various certificate courses. Additionally, the university offers an M.Phil program in various disciplines at the research level. The duration of UG courses is three to five years and for PG courses it is two years, whereas Research programs can long up to five years. Some of the popular Utkal University of Culture course details are listed below along with their specialisations, eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Utkal University of Culture - UUC Odisha offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Humanities & Social Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Des, BHM and BHMTT. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Utkal University of Culture - UUC Odisha offers PG Diploma, M.A. and MVA. The fees for Utkal University of Culture - UUC Odisha courses range between INR 100 to 1,200.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Hotel Management (with International Certification) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for hospitality industry.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% to 80% of students get placed in our course. The starting salary offered is Rs.15,000 to Rs.20,000 per month and the highest salary depends on the skills of the students. The international salary package offered is 1 LPM to 1.5 LPM. Our college has tied up with many national and international companies to provide a bright future for students like Taj Hotels, ITC, Trident, Mayfair, Lemon Tree, Oberoi Hotels & Resorts, and some international brands like Marriott International, Hyatt, and Vistara.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is very good. Our campus consists of 4 classrooms, a front office lab, 2 housekeeping labs, a service lab, and a production lab. It has a sports room with many types of games and equipment. Library has a wide range of books related to our course and other books for improving the skills of the students. Canteen is average but the medical facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Hotel Management, Catering Technology and Tourism - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college in Bhubaneswar.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. About 100% of students get international and national placements. They also offer Z1 visa facilities. It's a very smooth process to opt for international placements. They provide placements in the best hotels.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. They provide transportation facilities so that students will not face any kind of problems while going to college. There is a separate bed for each student. Rooms are very neat and clean. Rooms and washrooms are hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Hotel Management, Catering Technology and Tourism - Batch of 2023

faqs.answer: Admission to Utkal University of Culture is given on the nature of courses and programs. Here is how it's divided:Undergraduate Programs:Eligibility: 10+2 or equivalent with a minimum percentage that varies by courseAdmission: Generally merit in the qualifying exam Postgraduate Programs:Eligibility: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field with minimum percentage varies by course.Admission: Merit in the qualifying examination most of the time, and sometimes entrance test/interview are also part of the process.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Utkal University of Culture?

faqs.answer: So far, there is no cut-off list issued by Utkal University of Culture for this admission session. Normally, cut-offs are released right after the entrance exams like OJEE or immediately after counseling. Students who are interested in seeking admission must keep checking their website as well as the portal of OJEE for fresh cut-off and admission announcements. All notices from the university will also be available for further interaction to keep in pace with the cutoff marks set out for being admitted in some particular programme.
faqs.question: Q: Is the Utkal University of Culture cutoff released?

faqs.answer: The cutoff of OJEE for one year varies for Utkal University of Culture due to various factors like applicants number, overall performance, and available seats. The general cut-off for the MBA programme is 40-60 percentiles; it varies according to specialisation for the postgraduate course. the latest and correct cut-off lists for prospect candidates can also be obtained on the official OJEE website or Utkal University of Culture admission page. Proper counseling sessions and keeping informed about the announcements can serve as an insight into admissions.
faqs.question: Q: What is the OJEE cutoff for Utkal University of Culture?

faqs.answer: Utkal University of Culture accepts the OJEE entrance scores for admission to the MBA program. MBA at the institute is offered in 3 specialisations. To be eligible for admission, a candidate must have a minimum graduation score of 45%. Candidates can visit the Shiksha website to get information on the admission process at Utkal University of Culture.
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exams are accepted by Utkal University of Culture for admission to MBA?

answer.text: Utkal University of Culture is really the best choice to pursue MBA as the MBA placements percentage here in the year 2024 was recorded to be 100%. According to the university NIRF report 2024, the median package offered to MBA (two-year) students was INR 4.5 LPA. The university scored 3.16 cumulative grade point average (CGPA) to secure grade A while it secured A+ grade with 3.53 CGPA in 2016.

faqs.question: How good is Utkal University of Culture for MBA?

answer.text: It has become one of the university's the finest courses because the Utkal University of Culture specializes in the study of cultures from multiple disciplines that also range across art, music, and dance. With its multi-disciplinary methodology, this programme equips a student with vast and glorious cultural heritage combined with sound intellectual thought and logical abilities, all of which facilitate increased employment prospects in these culturally dominated areas. Besides, the fact that a great focus of this institution lies on the frontlines of research and creativity also leads to a rather compelling academic atmosphere for such purposes; the M.A. course will prove rather desirable to the interested scholars willing to enhance the realm of art and culture.

faqs.question: Why M.A. is considered as the top course at Utkal University of Culture?

overview_faqs.question: How good is Utkal University of Culture for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Utkal University of Culture is really the best choice to pursue MBA as the MBA placements percentage here in the year 2024 was recorded to be 100%. review_summary.college_name: Utkal University of Culture - UUC Odisha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Visual Art (BVA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The best staff and teachers that one can get.

content.Placements: I think all of my classmates get placed in leading VFX companies. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the lowest, I think, is 2.5 LPA. Companies like Accenture, Pixar, and Prime Focus are hiring us. 90% of students get internships. The top role one of my seniors gets is that of a lead animation designer.
content.Infrastructure: The college is very neat and clean. Classes are very spacious. Wi-Fi speed is very fast. We also have computer labs with AC. The library is also vast, with lots of books related to visual art. The food quality is really good. The canteen is clean, and we always get fresh and hot food.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in 3D Animation and VFX - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It provides the best placement opportunities we will ever get.

content.Placements: 100% of my batchmates will get jobs as we are approached by different companies throughout the year. My senior batch got the average salary package of 10 LPA. Companies like Prime Focus, Ani Brain, and Accenture hire students from our college. 90% of students get internships. The top role offered to us is lead animation designer.
content.Infrastructure: The college is very neat and clean. Classrooms are very spacious. It has very fast Wi-Fi. The library is also vast with plenty of books related to VFX and visual art. The quality of the food is also top-notch. We are always getting freshly cooked meals. Medical facilities are also near. We have a TT court near the canteen area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hotel Management (with International Certification) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for hospitality industry.

content.Placements: Around 70% to 80% of students get placed in our course. The starting salary offered is Rs.15,000 to Rs.20,000 per month and the highest salary depends on the skills of the students. The international salary package offered is 1 LPM to 1.5 LPM. Our college has tied up with many national and international companies to provide a bright future for students like Taj Hotels, ITC, Trident, Mayfair, Lemon Tree, Oberoi Hotels & Resorts, and some international brands like Marriott International, Hyatt, and Vistara.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is very good. Our campus consists of 4 classrooms, a front office lab, 2 housekeeping labs, a service lab, and a production lab. It has a sports room with many types of games and equipment. Library has a wide range of books related to our course and other books for improving the skills of the students. Canteen is average but the medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Hotel Management, Catering Technology and Tourism - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college in Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. About 100% of students get international and national placements. They also offer Z1 visa facilities. It's a very smooth process to opt for international placements. They provide placements in the best hotels.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. They provide transportation facilities so that students will not face any kind of problems while going to college. There is a separate bed for each student. Rooms are very neat and clean. Rooms and washrooms are hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Hotel Management, Catering Technology and Tourism - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best hotel management institute in Odisha.

content.Placements: It is the top hotel management college in eastern India. The lowest salary offered is Rs.10000 per month. Around 100% of students get placements and internships. The stipend offered is Rs. 12000 per month to 15000 per month. International certificates are available. Royal Caribbean and Emirate Airlines are top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best classrooms. It has a library. All types of books are available. We get free Wi-Fi. It has the best practical rooms and a front office practical room. Every year, our college conducts sports like cricket, football, and long jump. Food quality is also good. Labs and classrooms are air-conditioned.

faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission to BSS Foundation - School of Management?

faqs.answer: BSS Foundation - School of Management flagship course is MBA. The course is offered in several specialisations, such as Human Resources, Finance, Marketing and others. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility to be able to apply for the course. The criteria is that the candidate must have secured 50% marks (General), 45% marks (reserved category) aggregate at the Undergraduate level. Further, candidates are required to appear in accepted entrance exam for admisison. Additionally, the college offers three UG courses, such as BCom, BBA and BCA. Admission to these UG courses is based on last qualifying exam score i.e. pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate or Diploma in Computer/IT/ E&TC Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: What is the top course at BSS Foundation - School of Management?

faqs.answer: BSS Foundation - School of Management offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. Aspirants who have pass graduation degree with minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggreagte for reserved category) can apply for the MBA programme. Further, candidates are required to apply and appear in the accepted entrance exam for final seat allocation. The institute offers MBA in below specialisations:Marketing ManagementFinancial ManagementHuman Resource ManagementBusiness AnalyticeDigital Maketing

content.Placements: This college has a placement cell that mainly focuses on students' growth and preparation for high-paying jobs. A large percentage of students get on-campus internships here, so what you want to do is very close to your dream of getting an internship here.
content.Infrastructure: Their labs are excellent, and it is a good college. They have been cooled before any student enters the lab, and the classrooms also have interactive televisions that are very good and helpful for study. The mess has the best taste, and every sport is available here.

admission_process.title: BSS Foundation - School of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BSS Foundation - School of Management admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers four courses; BBA, BCA, BCom and MBA at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Students can pursue the course across several specialisations, such as Marketing, HR, Finance, and more. The admission and application process mainly commences online. Aspiring students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, and admission process ofBSS Foundation - School of Management:

BSS Foundation - School of Management offers courses in a full-time mode in Management, Commerce and Computer Science disciplines. Students must fulfil the basic eligibility and selection criteria as per the requirements of the programme they are applying for. Check below theBSS Foundation - School of Management coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The admission procedure for BSS Foundation - School of Management involves several steps, such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission into the offered courses are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria before applying. Eligible candidates can follow the step-wise BSS Foundation - School of Management admission process explained below:
Step 1: BSS Foundation - School of Management Application Process
Students can visit the official website of the college and apply for the desired course by filling out the online application form.
Step 2: BSS Foundation - School of ManagementSelection Process

Students must clear the qualifying entrance examination accepted by the college for admission to MBA. Further, for UG courses, candidates are selected based on performance in the last qualifying exam scores.
Step 3: BSS Foundation - School of Management Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay theBSS Foundation - School of Management feesto confirm their seat at the college

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BSS Foundation - School of Management MBA admission?
faqs.answer: To be eligible forBSS Foundation - School of Management MBA admission, students must qualify the basic eligibility. The basic eligibility is to pass graduation from a recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% aggregate for students belonging to the reserved categories). As admissions are primarily entrance-based, students need to provide valid scores of the accepted entrance exams. Eligible students can visit the official website of the college to apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: Which are the MBA specialisations offered at BSS Foundation - School of Management?
faqs.answer: BSS Foundation - School of Management offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. Aspirants who have pass graduation degree with minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggreagte for reserved category) can apply for the MBA programme. Further, candidates are required to apply and appear in the accepted entrance exam for final seat allocation. The institute offers MBA in below specialisations:Marketing ManagementFinancial ManagementHuman Resource ManagementBusiness AnalyticeDigital Maketing

faqs.question: How can I get an BCom seat at BSS Foundation - School of Management?
faqs.answer: Candidates are selected for BCom at BSS Foundation - School of Management based on their scores in last qualifying exam. To be eligible for admission candidates must fill out the basic eligibility criteria. The basic eligibility criteria for BCom is a pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised board. After full fill out the candidates need to apply online for the admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BSS Foundation - School of Management?
faqs.answer: To get admission in either of the courses offered by BSS Foundation - School of Management, candidates need to qualify the admission criteria of the desired programme. Those who clear the admission criteria can then apply for the course of choice on the college's official website. For the MBA course, the college shortlists students on several basis, such as entrance exam scores. Meanwhile, for UG programme, students need to clear the basic eligibility i.e pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Selected students must pay the admission fees to secure their seats at the college.

faqs.question: What is the top course at BSS Foundation - School of Management?
faqs.answer: BSS Foundation - School of Management flagship course is MBA. The course is offered in several specialisations, such as Human Resources, Finance, Marketing and others. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility to be able to apply for the course. The criteria is that the candidate must have secured 50% marks (General),  45% marks (reserved category) aggregate at the Undergraduate level. Further, candidates are required to appear in accepted entrance exam for admisison. Additionally, the college offers three UG courses, such as BCom, BBA and BCA. Admission to these UG courses is based on last qualifying exam score i.e. pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate or Diploma in Computer/IT/ E&TC Engineering.

faqs.question: How does BSS Foundation - School of Management select students for admission?
faqs.answer: BSS Foundation - School of Management admission is merit-based to al its UG course. However, for MBA, college accept entrance exam score for admission. To proceed with filling the application form, applicants must visit the official websites of college and apply for the desired course. It will be easier to secure a seat based on eligibility and score in entrance exam.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at BSS Foundation - School of Management?
faqs.answer: BSS Foundation - School of Management offers merit-based admission to all its UG courses. Further, for admission to MBA, college accept entrance exam score. To get admission to MBA, candidates are required to apply and appear in the entrance exam accepted by the college. After fill out the criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply by visiting college official website.

placement_data.title: BSS Foundation- School of Management Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: BSS Foundation- School of Management plcement cell dedicatedly works towards making students ready for the corporate world. They provide various facilities like career counselling, internship opportunities, Resume and cover letter workshops, interview preparation, skill development program etc. BSS Foundation- School of Management also provides 100% placement assisstance to its students. The highest package recorded during BSS Foundation- School of Management placements 2025 was INR 22 LPA . A total of 277 recruiters were a part of the 2025 placement season, some of them are Accenture, Emkay, Motilal Oswal, Oppo, ICICI, and many more.
NOTE: The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data mentioned above is assumed for the year 2025 .
